diagnostic.help: remove one declaration or make both timer bind values identical
diagnostic.message: conflicting timer bind facts for 'latch' on transition [on_tick]

related.message: first timer bind was declared here

source.text:
net cadence_tick_conflicting_timer_bind

(tick_latch) -tick_latch-> [on_tick] -tick_latch-> (tick_latch)
@tick_clock: (clock) -clock->? [on_tick]
[on_tick] handler "on_tick@cadence"
[on_tick] timer clock (clock) cel "clock.now >= latch.fired_at"
[on_tick] timer bind latch (tick_latch)
[on_tick] timer bind latch (clock)
